title: Unique 26193 Plastic Foil Tablecloth-2.13 m x 1.37 m-Bright Triangle Birthday Party-1 Count (Pack of 1), Multicolour
features: 1 Foil Bright Triangle Birthday Table Cover
Foil tablecloth measures 2.13 m x 1.37 m
Protects your table at any birthday party
Disposable tablecloth makes cleaning up quick and easy
Combine with other Bright Triangle Birthday party supplies from Unique Party
description: Product Description It’s time to celebrate with our Foil Bright Triangle Birthday Tablecloth. Decked out in a yellow, pink, and blue triangle design, this 2.13 by 1.37 metre foil table cover will bring some colour to your birthday party. Just place it over any of your party tables and instantly transform it into a cute snack bar, bright gift drop-off table, or other party display. Made of water-resistant foil, this tablecloth will protect your table from any spills. Then, you can simply throw it away after the party, making clean-up quick and easy! Bring more brightness to your celebration and shop the rest of our colourful party supplies today. Safety Warning PACKAGING WARNING: To avoid danger of suffocation, keep this plastic bag away from babies and children. Do not use this bag in cribs, beds, carriages or playpens. This bag is not a toy.
